title: catevala affinis
intro: Catevala affinis, also known as the Desert Teosinte, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Catevala affinis include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various applications in natural remedies and folk medicine.
